description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly coral pink upper, accented by a white toe cap and white laces. The shoe features a black outsole and a prominent black Nike logo on the lateral side. The lacing system is standard, with white laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets. The heel and collar are padded, providing comfort and support, while the overall silhouette is streamlined and sporty. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic leather or rubber for the upper, with a likely foam or textile interior for cushioning.
description: A coral pink low-top sneaker with a white toe cap, white laces, black outsole, and a black Nike logo on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white toe cap, white laces, and the rounded shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coral pink upper, white toe, and the absence of visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar and the smooth, uninterrupted coral pink back.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the black Nike logo, coral pink upper, and white toe cap.
attribute_logo: Black Nike swoosh logo on the right lateral side of the shoe
